nasb.text: The descendants of Israel separated themselves from all foreigners, and stood and confessed their sins and the iniquities of their fathers.

esv.text: And the Israelites separated themselves from all foreigners and stood and confessed their sins and the iniquities of their fathers.

cnv.text: 以色列的後裔跟所有外族人分離，然後站立，承認自己的罪過和他們列祖的罪孽。

ccb.text: 以色列人与其他外族人隔离，站着承认自己的罪恶和祖先的过犯。
